author: Austin Crawford
title: GSP Oysters Fundraiser For BI Causes
summary: Great Salt Pond Oyster Company’s Thanksgiving oyster fundraiser is Tuesday, November 25th (12-2:00PM) outside Virginica Pizza.
content:
Great Salt Pond Oyster Company’s Thanksgiving oyster fundraiser is Tuesday, November 25th (12-2:00PM) outside Virginica Pizza.
GSP oysters available pay what you wish to the nonprofit(s) of your choice!
100% of sales donated to Block Island nonprofits

All BI nonprofits are welcome to participate by dropping off a vessel for collection.
Please be in touch to be listed as a participating nonprofit, or bring a vessel to Virginica Pizza before the sale begins.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Eco-Depot: Household Hazardous Waste Drop-Off
summary: What is Accepted
content:
What is Accepted

Eco-Depots are free collections for properly disposing of household hazardous waste from RI households. Household hazardous waste is anything labeled with a skull and crossbones, or words like 'toxic', 'poison', 'flammable', 'combustible', etc. Please visit

www.ecodepotri.org for a full list of accepted items. Examples include:

- mercury containing devices

- automotive fluids

- fertilizers

- pesticides

- pool chemicals

- paint, polishes and

- propane tanks (no larger than 20lbs.)

 

Appointments are Required

Appointments are made to prevent everyone from showing up at once, which reduces

wait time in line. We service 25 cars every 15 minutes—you won’t even need to get out

of your vehicle! Appointments may be scheduled by emailing ecodepot@rirrc.org or by

calling 401-942-1430 ext. 3241.

accepted.

The HHW collection is for households only, no commercial entities/materials will be.

title: Taco Tuesday at Old Island Pub
summary: Tuesday Only!
content:
Tuesday Only!

12PM ‘til it’s gone!

 

— CHIPS & SALSA —
house made chips with fresh salsa
$8
— TUNA TOSTADA —
blackened ahi on a crispy tortilla with avocado, seaweed salad/kelpchee on a bed of rice and topped with wasabi aioli and a sweet chili sauce
$18
— CHICKEN ENCHILADA —
served with rice and beans, salsa and sour cream
$18
— SHRIMP CEVICHE —
served with house made chips, avocado, seaweed salad/kelpchee and wasabi aioli
$18
— STEAMED MUSSELS —
served with chorizo, onions, peppers and tomatoes in a spicy chipotle cream with tortilla strips on the side
$18

your choice of the following in a toasted tortilla with onions, peppers and cheddar
Plain $14, Chicken, Beef or Pork $16, Shrimp or Spicy Tuna $18

any taco meat with lettuce, tomato, sour cream and salsa served with warm tortillas
Chicken, Beef, Pork or Veggie $16 Shrimp or Spicy Tuna $18

served with cheddar, lettuce, tomato
$5 / each

served with cheddar, lettuce and avocado

author: Austin Crawford
title: Garden Harvest Luncheon and Kelp Farming Presentation
summary: All are welcome at the Block Island Gardeners’ “Harvest from our Gardens” luncheon on Wednesday, September 14 at noon on the porch of the Narragansett Inn. Please bring a favorite dish incorporating harvest from your garden (or someone else’s). Following lunch, enjoy a presentation by Block Island’s own Catherine Puckett: Gardening Above and Below the Ocean: Kelp Harvesting on Block Island.” For questions, please email Maude at
content:
All are welcome at the Block Island Gardeners’ “Harvest from our Gardens” luncheon on Wednesday, September 14 at noon on the porch of the Narragansett Inn. Please bring a favorite dish incorporating harvest from your garden (or someone else’s). Following lunch, enjoy a presentation by Block Island’s own Catherine Puckett: Gardening Above and Below the Ocean: Kelp Harvesting on Block Island.” For questions, please email Maude at
maudec158@gmail.com.

author: Austin Crawford
title: The Legion picnic
summary: Your great American Legion Family Picnic is back!! Hot dogs, hamburgers, corn, salads… the works!! All you can eat. Fifteen dollars per person is the suggested donation. Kids under 8 eat FREE. So bring the whole family, or just you!! Spread the word. Tell everyone. Residents, visitors, cottagers, everybody. But please support Block Island Post 36 and our veterans. We count on your support.
content:
Your great American Legion Family Picnic is back!! Hot dogs, hamburgers, corn, salads… the works!! All you can eat. Fifteen dollars per person is the suggested donation. Kids under 8 eat FREE. So bring the whole family, or just you!! Spread the word. Tell everyone. Residents, visitors, cottagers, everybody. But please support Block Island Post 36 and our veterans. We count on your support. 

Tickets available at the door or at the Farmers Market.
